text_block_list.text:
On our way back, we run into the white cat again.
For some reason, he keeps his distance from us
today.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: He ran off. Guess I shouldn't be too surprised.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A while ago, I tried to take Frosty in... I blew it,
though.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Y'know how I said he's been getting weaker?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I thought it'd be a good idea for Frosty to
become a house cat. I even looked for someone
to take care of him.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey, Frosty. It's okay now.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You don't have to live out on the streets
anymore. C'mere...

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Mraaaooww!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I never saw him so angry before. I was so
confused.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But then I started wondering why he'd been a
stray all this time.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, why would a cat as clever and friendly as
Frosty choose the streets? Why wouldn't he just
settle down in someone's home?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Looking back, I think the reason he was able to
make it out there is because he held onto his
pride.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I tried to force him to change his lifestyle, saying
he'd be happier if he had a home.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But really, I'm the one who can't handle the
situation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to try talking to him one last time.
'Cause I really do want an easy life for him.

"But I'll let Frosty choose for himself," she says
softly to herself.

The big day comes and Seiun Sky waits for Frosty
along his patrol route.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Frosty. I wanted to apologize about the
other day. I was being selfish.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The world of stray cats is cruel, but you've done
so well making a life for yourself out here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But y'know... I think you've struggled for long
enough.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it. I want you to be happy, Frosty—to
be safe... because I'm your friend.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But that's just how I feel. What you do next, well, it's up to you.

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: ...Meow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Frosty!

Frosty slowly approaches Sky, who lifts him gently
and hugs him tight.

And so, the two of them head off to Frosty's new
home.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I'm glad things ended happily... but oh, how I'll miss my Beatrix! Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're still using that name? You know Frosty's a
male cat, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Sei, are you really okay with this? It must hurt to
say adios to an amigo...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess I'd be lying if I said I won't miss him.
Nya-ha-ha!
choice_data_list: It's not like you'll never see each other again.
It's nice that Frosty listened to you.
It's nice that Frosty listened to you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well... I guess I'd be lying if I said I won't miss him.
Nya-ha-ha!
choice_data_list: It's not like you'll never see each other again.
It's nice that Frosty listened to you.
It's nice that Frosty listened to you.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. I'm thinking I'll go check on him every
now and then.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh right, his name won't be Frosty anymore. He's
on cat life number two now, and that means
getting a new name.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Being served food without having to ask for it,
staying warm and snug all day... Retirement must
be real nice.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I know, geez. I've still got plenty of pep in my
step. I've learned a thing or two from Frosty!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
What a relief, though. I was really worried
whether or not I was being too forceful. I mean, I
can't really decide what's best for him on my own,
right?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But all my plotting paid off in the end. We really
couldn't have asked for a happier ending!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, Frosty went and retired without too much fuss, but there's still plenty of gas in this tank.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey, I made it through that painful
goodbye, so now it's time to get back on track!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oho, what's this? Why, you're just about the
biggest cat I've ever seen.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Brace yourself—you're in for a floofing!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Take this! And this! How's that? Now say "uncle"!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
There, there... You don't have to try and take
Frosty's place, you know. I'll be fine.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I like you best when you're just being yourself,
Trainer... Nya-ha-ha! ♪
